context: Tests whether the agent supports Java's Javadoc format and correctly adds a @param entry for the new maxRetries parameter while proposing (not auto-writing) a README update for the code-span mention.

checklist.name: New @param added
checklist.description: DataService.java Javadoc contains a `@param maxRetries` line documenting the new parameter

checklist.name: Javadoc format used
checklist.description: The added documentation uses `@param maxRetries` format (Javadoc style) — NOT Python docstring or YARD format

checklist.name: Existing @param lines untouched
checklist.description: The existing `@param category` and `@param limit` lines in DataService.java are unchanged

checklist.name: README update proposed
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains a 'Proposed' entry referencing README.md for the fetchByCategory code-span mention

checklist.name: README not auto-written
checklist.description: README.md is unchanged — the agent did NOT auto-write to the markdown file

checklist.name: Unified report format
checklist.description: doc-sync-report.md contains '## Doc Sync Report' as a top-level heading
